title: Add description section to task
excerpt: In ClickUp I like that it allows you to add descriptions to the task to populate with relevant data. Where in monday you need to just add it as an update. Having the description section keeps the most relevant informatio…

posts.author: micheese (Mich)
posts.cookedHtml: In ClickUp I like that it allows you to add descriptions to the task to populate with relevant data. Where in monday you need to just add it as an update. Having the description section keeps the most relevant information at the top

posts.author: rajavanya (Rajavanya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey I used to do that as well, but the real solution is to use this
https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/17653444316562-The-Item-Description

Hope that helps!
